name: why_preserved
description: Does the memory entry preserve the 'why' — the reason or context that makes the fact load-bearing for edge-case judgment? Memory entries that strip the why become brittle when conditions shift.
task_prompt:
Below is a memory entry. Does it explain the reasoning, cause, or motivation behind the fact — not just the fact itself, but the 'why'?

Memory entry:
---
{input}
---

Answer exactly one word: yes or no.
